name: Amazon Prime Video
tagline: Telugu theatrical premieres and a deep back catalogue on Amazon's streaming service.
intro: Amazon Prime Video is one of the largest OTT windows for Telugu cinema, particularly for big-budget theatrical releases that premiere digitally four to eight weeks after their cinema opening. Prime Video's Telugu slate spans recent blockbusters, regional originals, dubbed Hindi and Tamil films, and a substantial back catalogue that goes back decades. For viewers outside India, Prime Video is often the only legal streaming option for new Telugu titles, making it a critical platform for the diaspora. Our directory tracks every Telugu film and series that lands on Prime Video in India, with streaming dates sourced from official announcements and verified against the platform's live listings. If a title has a confirmed Prime Video window, you will find it here with its release date and a dedicated page summarising what we know about availability, cast, and runtime.
